sizing_rule.note: When using parametric optimal f on equalized data: (1) Convert all trade P&L to percentage returns, (2) Standardize the percentage-based data, (3) Apply parametric optimal f to derive position size. The specific optimal f value is derived from the equalized percentage-based dataset rather than raw dollars.

source_rule_text: Convert all trade profits and losses to percentage profits and losses before standardizing data when using parametric optimal f on equalized data for position sizing.
